debug_info.goal:
case some.none
𝕜 : Type u_2
α : Type u_4
mα : MeasurableSpace α
inst✝² : DiscreteMeasurableSpace α
inst✝¹ : Fintype α
inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
r : ENNReal
f g : α → 𝕜
hr₀ : r ≠ 0
p : NNReal
hpqr : ENNReal.HolderTriple (some p) none r
⊢ ‖f * g‖_[r] ≤ ‖f‖_[some p] * ‖g‖_[none]

proof:
cases hpqr; simp_all +decide [ENNReal.div_eq_inv_mul]
    subst_vars
    by_cases hp : p = 0 <;> simp_all +decide [dLpNorm_eq_sum_nnnorm]
    have h_term_by_term : ∀ x, (‖f x‖₊ * ‖g x‖₊) ^ (p : ℝ) ≤ (‖f x‖₊ ^ (p : ℝ)) * (‖g‖_[∞] ^ (p : ℝ)) := by
      intro x; rw [← NNReal.mul_rpow]; gcongr; exact nnnorm_le_dLinftyNorm
    refine le_trans (NNReal.rpow_le_rpow (Finset.sum_le_sum fun _ _ => h_term_by_term _) (by positivity)) ?_
    rw [← Finset.sum_mul _ _ _]
    rw [NNReal.mul_rpow, ← NNReal.rpow_mul, mul_inv_cancel₀ (by positivity), NNReal.rpow_one]
successful_attempts:
cases hpqr; simp_all +decide [ENNReal.div_eq_inv_mul]
    subst_vars
    by_cases hp : p = 0 <;> simp_all +decide [dLpNorm_eq_sum_nnnorm]
    have h_term_by_term : ∀ x, (‖f x‖₊ * ‖g x‖₊) ^ (p : ℝ) ≤ (‖f x‖₊ ^ (p : ℝ)) * (‖g‖_[∞] ^ (p : ℝ)) := by
      intro x; rw [← NNReal.mul_rpow]; gcongr; exact nnnorm_le_dLinftyNorm
    refine le_trans (NNReal.rpow_le_rpow (Finset.sum_le_sum fun _ _ => h_term_by_term _) (by positivity)) ?_
    rw [← Finset.sum_mul _ _ _]
    rw [NNReal.mul_rpow, ← NNReal.rpow_mul, mul_inv_cancel₀ (by positivity), NNReal.rpow_one]
